_comment: AUDIT TEST CASE: REF only, No ENCL - Measure Subj → REF and REF → Body spacing
subj: REF ONLY COLLAPSE SPACING AUDIT TEST CASE
body: 1. First paragraph for spacing audit. This line verifies baseline-to-baseline measurement between REF block and first body paragraph when ENCL is not present.
2. Second paragraph for spacing audit. This paragraph confirms consistent paragraph-to-paragraph spacing.
3. Third paragraph for spacing audit. Final paragraph before signature block.
